title: คืนฝันของฉันและเธอ
overview: Night and Dream were once close friends, but a misunderstanding arose that led to their separation. Right before graduate and pursue college, the two meet again. Will this meeting get them close again?

trailers.title: [OFFICIAL TEASER 1] Night Dream Series คืนของฉันฝันของเธอ (ENG SUB)
